nits: readConfig casts raw config to GoogleSheetsConfig but only validates spreadsheet_id; non-string sheet_name or start_row would throw confusingly at .length / arithmetic — defensive typeof checks would be cleaner
header_row config accepts string[] in the type but the code only honors `=== false`; explicit array form is silently ignored in favor of re-deriving from row 0

adapter reads A1:Z regardless of start_row (spec wording suggested 'A<start_row>:Z'); semantics still produce correct absolute row_numbers because the baseline uses the same range, but it diverges from the literal spec text

countNonEmptyRows uses last-nonzero-index+1, so a gap (empty row between data rows) inflates the count and would emit a synthetic event with empty row_data for the gap row on the next append — minor edge case not pinned by spec

doc comment says 'the existing D.5 input mapper ... keeps working unchanged' but in practice the poll path goes through the kicker's own buildInputs in cron-kicker/handler.ts, not D.5's sheetsRowAddedMapper — comment is slightly misleading
uses direct fetch to /tools/execute/{slug} instead of the shared executeTool helper in shared/src/composio.ts; behavior is equivalent but duplicates the call construction
COMPOSIO_BASE_URL default ends in /api/v3.1 — confirm this matches what shared/src/composio.ts uses to avoid drift between code paths
